diagrams.title: Process State Transition including Termination
diagrams.description: Shows process lifecycle from NEW to TERMINATED states, including zombie state
diagrams.purpose: Understand process states and where termination fits in the lifecycle

diagrams.title: Zombie Process Formation
diagrams.description: Illustrates how zombie processes are created when parent doesn't call wait()
diagrams.purpose: Visualize zombie process creation and why it occurs

diagrams.title: Orphan Process Adoption by Init
diagrams.description: Shows what happens when parent terminates before child
elements: init calls wait() when children terminate
diagrams.purpose: Understand orphan process handling in Unix/Linux
